body:
Implementation plan added to issue description.

- New files: `src/types/submissionPackage.ts`, `src/lib/submissionPackage.ts`, `src/components/SubmissionPackage/*`
- Modified: `src/components/ViewModeSwitch/ViewModeSwitch.tsx` (add 'package' mode), `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx`, `page.module.css`
- Key decisions: adds 4th ViewMode 'package' distinct from existing 'submissions' (SubmissionTracker); export is plain-text .txt bundle (DOCX deferred - requires external library); metadata refresh only replaces unfilled {{placeholder}} tokens not writer-edited text; 20-version max history

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous BIN-82 stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled.
